channel.title: Posts on Zhiyi Zhao(赵知易)
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Zhiyi Zhao(赵知易)

item.title: Derivation of Plow Flow Equation
item.description: Intro Note that since the source is grounded, there is also a current flowing through bus to ground, which results in admittance matrix. Ohms Law DC Circuits: $V = IR$ AC Circuits: $\bar{V} = \bar{I}\bar{R} $ $\rightarrow$ $\bar{I} = \bar{Y} \bar{V} $ where, $\bar{Y} = \frac{1}{\bar{Z}}$ AC Network: $[I]{n*1} = [Y{bus}]{n*n} [V]{n*1}$

item.title: Newton-Raphon Method
item.description: Introduction Newton-Raphson Method is a must for every power engineer to write down the equation for a NR 3-Bus, 3 unknown system. This is once-in-a-life-time activity. Topology and Parameter Generating bus on 1-bus and 3-bus. power demand: $S_{L}$ Objective Gvien data on 3-bus system, determine unknown states of system NR Method.

item.title: Hugo使用教程
item.description: 创建博客 hugo new posts/blog.md 上传到Github仓库 hugo --theme=hugo-theme-bootstrap4-blog --baseUrl="https://isyzhz.github.io/" --buildDrafts cd public git init git add . git commit -m 'comment' git remote add origin https://github.com/isyzhz/isyzhz.github.io.git git push -u origin master
